finding.root_cause_summary: PlexQueryImpl.java imports `com.sun.org.apache.xml.internal.dtm.ref.DTMNodeList` on line 20, an internal JDK implementation class from the bundled Xerces parser. Starting with Java 9's module system (JEP 260), internal `com.sun.org.apache.xml.internal.*` packages are strongly encapsulated and no longer visible to application code — and by JDK 16+ many were removed entirely. The `parseXml()` method at line 390 already returns a standard `org.w3c.dom.NodeList` (via `XPathConstants.NODESET`), so the internal `DTMNodeList` type is unnecessary.

relevant_pom_pins.value: 3.13.0 (from error log, likely inherited from Spring Boot 3.3 parent)

finding.fix_hint: Replace `import com.sun.org.apache.xml.internal.dtm.ref.DTMNodeList` with `import org.w3c.dom.NodeList` and change the variable type on line 189 from `DTMNodeList` to `NodeList`.
